message:
chore(users): add kubestellar console to kube-ovn users

Add KubeStellar Console as a Kube-OVN user. KubeStellar Console is a
multi-cluster Kubernetes dashboard that includes a guided Kube-OVN
install mission and network monitoring integration.

Ref: kubeovn/kube-ovn#6457

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,3 +16,4 @@ Share you story about the Kube-OVN journey with the community.
 | User | Rackspace | https://docs.rackspacecloud.com/ | Rackspace uses Kube-OVN inside of its OpenStack solutions offering hybrid cloud capabilities in both public and private cloud environments. |
 | Vendor | Swisscom | [https://www.swisscom.ch](https://www.swisscom.ch/en/business/enterprise/offer/cloud/cloudnative/container-services.html) | Swisscom uses Kube-OVN as the cloud native SDN component in combination with KubeVirt for the kubernetes-as-a-service offering. |
 | User	| kt cloud | https://cloud.kt.com/ | kt cloud uses Kube-OVN within its next-generation standard cloud architecture, spanning both public and private cloud environments. |
+| User | KubeStellar Console | https://console.kubestellar.io | KubeStellar Console is a multi-cluster Kubernetes dashboard with 30+ dashboards and 150+ monitoring cards. It includes a guided [Kube-OVN install mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kube-ovn) and Kube-OVN network monitoring integration for visibility across clusters. |
